tray.title: VOCIX — {mode}
stats.title: VOCIX — Statistics
toast.update_body: Version {version} is available. Click the tray menu to open.
toast.up_to_date: You are on the latest version.
about.title: VOCIX — About
about.description:
Local voice dictation for Windows
with intelligent text processing.
error.mic_unavailable: Microphone unavailable. Please check your audio settings.
error.clipboard_nontext: Clipboard contains non-text content (e.g. an image or file). It will be overwritten by the insertion and cannot be restored.
error.cpu_unsupported_body:
VOCIX requires a CPU with AVX support (roughly 2012 or newer). The speech-to-text engine (CTranslate2) could not be loaded on this machine.

Details: {details}
prompt.business:
You are a professional writing assistant for business communication.

Your task:
- Transform the spoken text into professional, formal written language.
- The result should be suitable for e-mails, letters or business documents.
- Improve structure, grammar and tone.
- Remove filler words and colloquial expressions.
- Preserve the original meaning exactly.
- Respond ONLY with the rewritten text, no explanations or annotations.
- Respond in the same language as the input text.
prompt.rage:
You are a de-escalation assistant.

Your task:
- You receive text that may be aggressive, rude or emotionally charged.
- Rewrite it into a polite, respectful and factual form.
- The ORIGINAL MEANING and all factual arguments MUST be fully preserved.
- Remove insults, profanity and aggressive phrasing.
- Replace them with factual, constructive alternatives.
- The tone should be firm but polite — not submissive.
- Respond ONLY with the rewritten text, no explanations or annotations.
- Respond in the same language as the input text.

tooltip.input_language: Language you speak in — passed to Whisper.
tooltip.output_language: What gets pasted: original language or translated to English.
tooltip.whisper_model: Larger model = better quality, more RAM, slower.
tooltip.acceleration: GPU requires CUDA libraries (source setup only).
tooltip.api_key: Required for Business and Rage modes. Test sends a short ping.
tooltip.default_mode: Mode VOCIX starts with. Business/Rage require a valid API key.
tooltip.hotkey_record: Single key — push-to-talk needs hold-capable keys (e.g. Pause, F9).
tooltip.hotkey_mode_a: Key combo that switches directly to Clean mode.
tooltip.hotkey_mode_b: Key combo that switches directly to Business mode (requires API key).
tooltip.hotkey_mode_c: Key combo that switches directly to Rage mode (requires API key).
tooltip.model_dir: Directory where Whisper models are cached (~75 MB to ~3 GB per model).
tooltip.log_file: Path of the log file. Existing files are selected, not overwritten.
tooltip.log_level: DEBUG shows everything, INFO is default, WARNING/ERROR shows problems only.
tooltip.overlay_seconds: How long the status overlay (top right) stays visible after actions.
tooltip.rdp_mode: Extends clipboard and paste delays for remote desktop sessions.
tooltip.clipboard_delay: Wait time after copying to clipboard. Auto-increased in RDP mode.
tooltip.paste_delay: Wait time after Ctrl+V before the original clipboard is restored.
tooltip.silence_threshold: RMS value below which audio counts as silence. Higher = trim more aggressively.
tooltip.min_duration: Recordings shorter than this are discarded (prevents accidental triggers).
tooltip.whisper_language_override: Forces a different Whisper language than input. "auto" = follow input language.
tooltip.sample_rate: Whisper expects 16000 Hz — other values are experimental.
tooltip.anthropic_model: Claude model used for Business/Rage. Sonnet 4.6 is default.
tooltip.anthropic_timeout: Maximum wait time for an Anthropic API response.
tooltip.test_button: Sends a short ping to the Anthropic API to check the key.
tooltip.browse_button: Open a file or directory picker.
tooltip.other_key_button: Capture a hotkey live by pressing keys.
tooltip.reset_button: Reset all settings to factory defaults (clears state.json).

whisper_model.title: Whisper models compared
whisper_model.body:
tiny ~75 MB, very fast, low accuracy
base ~150 MB, fast
small ~500 MB, balanced (default)
medium ~1.5 GB, high accuracy
large-v3 ~3 GB, highest accuracy, slow
large-v3-turbo ~1.6 GB, near large-v3 quality at half the latency

acceleration.title: Hardware acceleration
acceleration.body:
Auto: uses GPU when available, otherwise CPU.
GPU: forces CUDA — requires nvidia-cublas + nvidia-cudnn (source setup only, not bundled in the ZIP).
CPU: forces CPU. Always works, slower.

api_key.title: Anthropic API key
api_key.body: Required for Business and Rage modes. Get a key at https://console.anthropic.com. Not required if you only use Clean mode.

rdp_mode.title: Remote desktop mode
rdp_mode.body: Enables extended clipboard and paste delays because RDP must sync the clipboard between host and client. Recommended: on when using VOCIX over RDP.

silence_threshold.title: Silence threshold
silence_threshold.body: Determines the RMS level at which audio counts as silence. Higher values trim more aggressively. Default 0.01 works in most environments; raise it in noisy rooms.

sample_rate.title: Sample rate
sample_rate.body: Whisper models are trained at 16 kHz. Other sample rates get resampled internally — only change this if you know exactly what you're doing.

whisper_language_override.title: Whisper language override
whisper_language_override.body: Normally Whisper uses your input language. You can force a different language here (e.g. speak German but transcribe as French). "auto" = follow input language.

anthropic_model.title: Anthropic model ID
anthropic_model.body:
claude-sonnet-4-6 — fast, good for Business/Rage (default).
claude-opus-4-7 — highest quality, slower, more expensive.
claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 — very fast, cheap, simple rephrasing.

status.api_locked: Set API key in Basics to unlock Claude options.

error.duplicate_hotkey: This hotkey is already in use.

confirm.factory_reset: Really reset all settings to factory defaults?
confirm.factory_reset_done: Factory defaults restored — please reopen the dialog.

notice.language_changed: Language changed — please close and reopen the dialog to see the new text.
